THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCHANT, CYNTHIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1288 MISSION STREET, ROOM 201, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-21-1996, IF DEFT VACATES PREMISES BEFORE 8/21/96, PLTF, SHALL FILE AN EX-PARTE APPLICATION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
